Tryif.wpT y iy r, f y y f % y [f^rryy-m/4/3ERT./424/l 6] CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF KERALA NOTIFICATION Kasaragod, the 21st February, 2017 No. CUK/ADM/Court-II/ 2016.—The following is published for general information.— Amendment to Statute 10 of Central University of Kerala on the constitution of the Second Court Section 26(b) read with Section 27(2) and Statute 10 of Central Universities Act, 2009 Existing Statute 10 Amended Statute 10 10(1) An annual meeting o f the Court shall be held on a date to be fixed by the Executive Council unless some other date has been fixed by the Court o f any year. (2) At an annual meeting o f the Court, a report on the working o f the University during the previous year, together with a statement o f the receipts and expenditure, the balance sheet as audited, and the financial estimates for the next year shall be presented. 10(1) An annual meeting o f the Court shall be held on a date to be fixed by the Executive Council unless some other date has been fixed by the Court o f any year. (2) At an annual meeting o f the Court, a report on the working o f the University during the previous year, together with a statement o f the receipts and expenditure, the balance sheet as audited, and the financial estimates for the next year shall be presented. -- 2 of 6 -- OpFT 111-33^ 4] NTO 351 TUPDf : 3 R W T 3 (3) A copy o f the statement o f receipts and expenditure, the balance sheet and the financial estimates referred to in clause (2) shall be sent to every member o f the Court at least seven days before the date o f the annual meeting. (4) Special meetings of the Court may be convened by the Executive Council or the Vice Chancellor or if there is no Vice Chancellor, the Pro-Vice-Chancellor or if there no Pro-Vice-Chancellor, by the Registrar. (5) Eleven members of the Court shall form a quorum for a meeting o f the Court. (3) A copy o f the statement o f receipts and expenditure, the balance sheet and the financial estimates referred to in clause (2) shall be sent to every member o f the Court at least seven days before the date o f the annual meeting. (4) Special meetings o f the Court may be convened by the Executive Council or the Vice Chancellor or if there is no Vice Chancellor, the Pro-Vice-Chancellor or if there no Pro-Vice-Chancellor, by the Registrar. (5) Eleven members o f the Court shall form a quorum for a meeting o f the Court. (6) Constitution o f the Second Court o f Central University o f Kerala with the following members; 1. Chancellor - Chairperson 2. Vice-Chancellor 3. All Deans 4. Finance Officer 5. Controller o f Examinations 6. Librarian 7. Senior most Warden 8. One Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor from each school, by rotation in the order o f seniority 9. Two persons representing learned professionals nominated by the Visitor 10. Four persons nominated by the Vice-Chancellor, representing SC/ST, OBC, Women, Minority 11. Two teachers from the University nominated by the Vice-Chancellor 12. One Non-Teaching staff from the University nominated by the Vice-Chancellor 13. The President and the Secretary from the Students Council 14. The Registrar - Member Secretary Dr. A. RADHAKRISHNAN Nair, Registrar [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./424/16] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. New Delhi-110064 SARVESH KUMAR SRIVASTAVA Digitally signed by SARVESH KUMAR SRIVASTAVA Date: 2017.03.30 23:34:05 +05'30' -- 3 of 6 -- Tfereff Ro ^t° ^0-33004/99 REGD. NO. D. L-33004/99 □ i R c l “ (ihe (Bazette of ^Jtidia ^ ^ ssi& ^ ^ TTTvHm 3HTiyi+f) xfT +f>yH URT, /iRld [R?TTW-ni/4/3UTT./241/17] 5805 GI/2017 (1) -- 4 of 6 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Part in—Sec. 4] CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF KERALA NOTIFICATION Kasaragod, the 13th September, 2017 No. CUK/STAT/AMENDMENT/12/03126.—Amendment of Statute 22 of Central University of Kerala on terms and conditions of service and code of conduct of teachers Existing Statute 22 Amended Statute 22 22 (7) All the teachers and other academic staff of the University shall , in the absence of any agreement to the contrary, be governed by the terms and conditions of service and code of conduct as are specified in the Statutes, the Ordinances and the Regulations. (2) The emoluments of members of the academic staff shall be such as may be prescribed by the Ordinances. (3) Every teachers and member of the academic staff of the University shall be appointed on a written Contract, the form of which shall be prescribed by the Ordinances. (4) A copy of every contract refered to in clause (3) shall be deposited with the Registrar. 22 (7) All the teachers and other academic staff of the University shall, in the absence of any agreement to the contrary, be governed by the terms and conditions of service and code of conduct as are specified in the Statutes , the Ordinances and the Regulations. (2) The emoluments of members of the academic staff shall be such as may be prescribed by the Ordinances. (3) Every teachers and member of the academic staff of the University shall be appointed on a written contract, the form of which shall be prescribed by the Ordinances. (4) A copy of every contract refered to in clause (3) shall be deposited with the Registrar. (5) The age of superannuation of teachers shall be 65 years. Dr. A. RADHAKR1SHNAN NAIR, Registrar [ADVT.-m/4/Exty7241/17] RAKESH SUKUL Digitally signed by RAKESH .SUKUL , Date: 2017.09.21 23:15:49 +05'30' Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 5 of 6 -- -- 6 of 6 --
